commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=7b04caef56f4e0c604fe9899e24d94ae321a0b95)
commands.review_summary:
The PR parses signed Nextcloud Talk webhook JSON before schema validation, returns 200/no dispatch for non-Note events, preserves 400 for malformed JSON or Note-shaped schema misses, and adds signed replay tests for Document/setup payloads.

PR surface: Source +32, Tests +77. Total +109 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main and v2026.6.8 map signed schema misses to HTTP 400, and PR head still sends official Like reaction-added hooks to the malformed-message 400 branch. I did not execute a live Nextcloud server in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor or maintainer action for the classifier gap and real behavior proof; this is not a safe repair-lane item while the external contributor proof gate remains unmet.

target.title: fix(nextcloud-talk): return 200 for non-message webhook events instead of 400
target.author: liuhao1024

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
